scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n core,cli,dashboard,supervisor -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm -C packages/core dev" "pnpm -C packages/cli dev" "pnpm -C packages/dashboard dev" "node packages/cli/dist/index.js supervisor"
scripts.clear: rm -f ~/.10xgrace/pipeline.sqlite ~/.10xgrace/pipeline.sqlite-wal ~/.10xgrace/pipeline.sqlite-shm ~/.10xgrace/resume.json && rm -rf ~/.10xgrace/sessions && echo '✓ Cleared local DB and per-session worktrees. Restart pnpm dev.'
